response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with strong architectural, full-stack, and mentoring skills. However, he falls significantly short of the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming experience, having only brief professional exposure to C/C++ over a decade ago. Given that this Technical Lead role requires deep expertise in C++ and low-level cloud compute infrastructure, his current tech stack (heavily focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang) does not align with the core technical needs of the position.
strengths: Demonstrated technical leadership and mentoring experience, including organizing workshops and coding Dojos.
Experience designing distributed systems and microservices handling high-traffic requests.
Strong background in software design, testing methodologies (TDD, CI/CD), and engineering best practices.
concerns: Lacks the required 8 years of C++ programming experience, with less than a year of professional exposure.
Technical background is heavily skewed towards full-stack web and product development rather than low-level compute infrastructure.
Limited evidence of mentoring dedicated cloud or DevOps engineers in a pure infrastructure context.
